{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20965_1
|class_id=20965
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=collection@20965_2
|fame=28
|art=13
|fth=14
|civ=18
|tech=17
|ss1=Against Hamsters,<br>Troop DMG toward heroes +1%<br>Against Hamsters,<br>Troop DMG toward heroes +1%
|ss2=Against Hamsters,<br>Troop DMG toward heroes +2%<br>Against Hamsters,<br>Troop DMG toward heroes +2%
|ss3=Against Hamsters,<br>Troop DMG toward heroes +3%<br>Against Hamsters,<br>Troop DMG toward heroes +3%
|ss4=Against Hamsters,<br>Troop DMG toward heroes +3%<br>Against Hamsters,<br>Troop DMG toward heroes +3%
|ss7=Against Hamsters,<br>Troop DMG toward heroes +3%<br>Against Hamsters,<br>Troop DMG toward heroes +3%<br> (Awakened)
}}
